title: On the Complementarity between Pre-Training and Back-Translation for Neural Machine Translation
description:
Extensive experiments on these approaches shows that our
simple approach works prodigiously well and further improvements from the back
translation (BT)[4]and replacing cross entropy with focal loss[5]sets a new
state-of-the-art on bothSi-EnandNe-En, improving the results
by0.

title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation
description:

language model[1]and created a baseline model for four languages, namely
